regions.text: It is hard to say what Time is. One man has time on his hands. Another man has not enough time for his reading.
The same amount of time may seem short to one person and long to another. A sense of time changes with feelings.
Some hours seem like they will never end. Others are past before they begin. Time goes quickly as you get older.
never: not ever. end: come to an end. FUTURE: will end. PRESENT: end(s). PAST: ended.
